queue.task: Session B kickoff: Review Session A's 29 bugs + 97% pass rate. Assess what's most impactful for depth work: CTEs through Volcano, correlated subqueries, window functions, or extraction.
queue.summary: Reviewed Session A: 29 bugs, 97%+ pass rate. Priority: CTEs through Volcano (14x speedup, high ROI), then correlated subqueries, then window functions. Queue aligned.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Route CTEs through Volcano for 14x speedup (5ms vs 70ms)
queue.summary: CTEs already route through Volcano planner (lines 28-56). Found real bug: CTE alias qualification broken (rs.region→undefined). Plan: fix alias bug + add tests.

queue.task: Fix CTE alias qualification bug: rs.region returns undefined when CTE aliased as rs
queue.summary: Fixed CTE alias qualification bug. CTE inner JOINs produced qualified names (c.region) that became double-qualified (rs.c.region) in outer query. Strip qualifiers during CTE materialization. 66 CTE tests + 85 SQL tests pass.

queue.task: Add comprehensive CTE-Volcano correctness tests (CTE aliasing, multi-CTE, nested CTE)
queue.summary: Added 11 CTE-Volcano integration tests: alias qualification, multi-CTE, JOINs inside CTEs, 3-way JOINs, parity checks. All pass.

queue.task: Git push, dashboard update, knowledge capture
queue.summary: Git pushed workspace+henrydb. Dashboard online and regenerated. CTE fix knowledge captured.

queue.task: Reflect on CTE work. Check remaining Volcano gaps. Decide next: window functions or correlated subqueries?
queue.summary: Correlated EXISTS/IN already work in Volcano. Real gap: scalar correlated subqueries in SELECT return null (Volcano), work in legacy. Also: func-wrapped aggregates (COALESCE(SUM(x),0)) fall back to legacy. Priority: (1) func-wrapped aggregates (quick win), (2) scalar correlated subqueries in SELECT.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Add correlated subquery support to Volcano planner
queue.summary: Two features: (1) func-wrapped aggregates: detect nested function(aggregate) in planner, extract inner agg, apply outer func in Project. (2) scalar correlated subqueries: buildValueGetter detect subquery type, execute sub-plan per outer row. 2 BUILD tasks.

queue.task: Support function-wrapped aggregates in Volcano (COALESCE(SUM(x),0), NULLIF(AVG(x),0), etc.)
queue.summary: Function-wrapped aggregates now supported in Volcano. COALESCE(SUM), NULLIF(COUNT), ROUND(AVG), ABS(SUM) all work. Guard removed. 115/115 tests pass.

queue.task: Support scalar correlated subqueries in Volcano SELECT columns
Mid-session quality check. Depth check: am I learning? Assess remaining time and priorities.

queue.goal: HenryDB: Window function support in Volcano iterators

queue.task: Git push, test sweep, knowledge capture
Research: what are the remaining ~3% failures? Categorize and triage.
